sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33932" key="e(lw/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑλώριος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a <sense id="n33932.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">water-bird</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">73</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐρῳδιός</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
